execution.noNonColorNudgesReason: The artifact is a 2-page prototype with seed token architecture. Non-color controls (density, spacing scale, typography scale) would require component-level token bindings that exceed prototype scope. The 4 Appearance presets already provide meaningful visual variation through seed token patches on --seed-bg, --seed-fg, --seed-primary, --seed-accent, --seed-surface, --seed-radius.
